tsTroubleshooting.domains: (topic tsTroubleshooting) (topic hi-d) (topic sdlVariables-c) (topic ut-d) (topic indexing-d) (topic sw-d) (topic ui-d) (topic oce-d) (topic oceCommonElements-c) (topic oceTopic-c hi-d oceHighlight-c) (topic oceTopic-c ui-d oceUi-c) (topic oceTopic-c sw-d oceSoftware-c) (topic oceTopic-c) (topic oceTopic-c task oceTask-c) (topic oceTopic-c tsTroubleshooting oceTroubleshooting-c)
tsTroubleshooting.title: 11 How to remove the activate windows message (R4.4 and higher)

abstract.p: The activate windows message can occur within days after the installation of a new software version on the printer.

li.p: This procedure can be executed remotely via Teamviewer. In that case 2 remote connections need to be made.
[Optional if the procedure is executed locally]. Start a remote VPN session via PRISMAservice. See How to use Teamviewer for Remote Assistance.

[Optional if the procedure is executed locally]. In the remote desktop session a remote address is created, type that number in your browser. The settings editor of the remote machine will be displayed.
[Optional if the procedure is executed locally]. Browse to: Configuration > Security > Show Windows activation wizard and click on the "No".
Login with the administrator password and click Request activation.
After the restart, go to the operator panel, where you will be requested to select your country. You need to be able to dial to that country. Select your country and press OK.
Dial either the toll or toll-free number.
Follow the instructions that are given via the telephone.
Type/answer the responses below to the automated prompts when calling the Microsoft Windows Phone activation number:
Press [1] or [2] to consent for recording the phone call (consent to recording of the call is not mandatory).
The automated system will provide a 3 digit security code for verification. Enter this security code into your phone when prompted by the automated system.
Answer 'Yes' when the system asks if you are calling for Office / Windows / ... products.
Answer 'Activate Windows' when the system ask for which matter you are calling for.
Answer 'Yes' when the system asks for Windows 10 or higher.
Answer "No' when the system asks if you are coming from an older version.
Answer 'No' when the system asks if you have a 25 digits product code.
Answer 'No' when the system asks if you have an error code.
Answer 'Yes' when the system asks if you are in front of the computer.
Answer 'Yes' when the system asks if you want to have the link sent to your smartphone.
Hang up the call and proceed with the link you got as text message.
When you receive a confirmation ID, press OK to continue.
You will be requested to fill out the confirmation via blocks of numbers. See example:
When the last block is filled out, you will get the following message. After restarting the license message will be gone. Press OK to continue.
In release 4.4, there is a known issue with the wizard reporting a Checking calibration status. Please wait… At this point, press Cancel to complete the wizard.
